block_slide: Soft short whoosh, gentle puzzle piece sliding, low warm tone, mobile game
block_hit_edge: Soft dull thud, muted gentle bump, low and quiet, mobile game
truck_door_close: Soft heavy thud, muffled door closing, low and warm, not metallic
truck_drive_away: Soft low hum fading away, gentle engine purr receding, warm and muted
block_exit: Soft pop with a gentle chime, warm and muted, satisfying puzzle game reward
level_complete: Soft warm chime melody, gentle short celebration, muted xylophone, cozy game jingle
chapter_complete: Warm gentle fanfare, soft muted trumpet with light chimes, cozy achievement jingle
button_click: Soft quiet tap, gentle muted click, warm low pop, mobile game UI
